content: Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop for refining outputs can be grounded in multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break out of local optimum plateaus that single-perspective self-refinement often gets stuck in. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while addressing its key limitation of repeated self-feedback reinforcing the model's own inherent biases.
